name: Westlake Chemical Partners LP
business: Westlake Chemical Partners LP owns a 22.8% limited partner interest in OpCo, which operates three ethylene production facilities and a pipeline. OpCo generates revenue primarily by selling ethylene to Westlake under a long-term agreement and by selling co-products to third parties.

exposures.sentence: OpCo generates revenue primarily by selling ethylene to Westlake and others, as well as through the sale of co-products of ethylene production, including propylene, crude butadiene, pyrolysis gasoline and hydrogen.

catalysts.event: Renewal of Ethylene Sales Agreement through December 31, 2027
catalysts.sentence: On October 28, 2025, OpCo and Westlake agreed to renew the Ethylene Sales Agreement through December 31, 2027 in accordance with its terms.
